task_completion.description: Apply an approved typeface at 11 points or larger to the document text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The font dropdown in the word processor toolbar shows Arial, Helvetica, Georgia, Palatino Linotype, or Liberation Sans. The font size dropdown shows 11 or a larger number.

task_completion.description: Set document margins to 0.5 inches on all sides.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Page Style/Page Setup dialog shows 0.50" (or 1.27 cm) for Left, Right, Top, and Bottom margins, or the horizontal and vertical rulers visually indicate a 0.5-inch margin space.

task_completion.description: Include a left-aligned header on every page with the specified text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The top margin area of the document contains the left-aligned text 'Chen, S. — R01CA298471 — Tumor Microenvironment Immunotherapy'. This should be visible inside the header section, not the main body.

task_completion.description: Ensure the six major section headings use the 'Heading 1' style.
task_completion.visual_evidence: When the cursor is placed on headings like 'Abstract', 'Specific Aims', or 'Research Strategy', the style dropdown in the toolbar explicitly shows 'Heading 1' is selected.

task_completion.description: Apply a 0.5-inch hanging indent to all entries in the References section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the References section, the first line of each citation is flush left, and subsequent lines are indented. The horizontal ruler shows the bottom indent marker (triangle) moved 0.5 inches to the right of the top marker, or the Paragraph settings dialog shows a Hanging indent of 0.5".

task_completion.description: Save the reformatted document as r01_formatted.docx.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Save As' dialog is used with the filename 'r01_formatted.docx', or the application title bar updates to show 'r01_formatted.docx' as the active document name.

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical word processor (e.g., LibreOffice Writer) to format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the LibreOffice Writer GUI (or similar word processor) open and being interacted with, rather than terminal commands or python scripts doing the formatting invisibly.

integrity.description: The agent used actual formatting tools rather than manual text manipulation.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent used the Paragraph dialog or ruler for hanging indents (not manually typing spaces/tabs) and the Styles menu for Heading 1 (not just manually bolding and enlarging text).

integrity.description: The agent did not overwrite the original draft document.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent uses 'File > Save As' to create the new file, or terminal listings show both 'r01_draft.docx' and 'r01_formatted.docx' existing simultaneously in the Documents folder.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Source document is /home/ga/Documents/r01_draft.docx. Output must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/r01_formatted.docx. Required font size is 11pt or larger. Liberation Sans is an acceptable Linux equivalent for the approved fonts. The 6 section headings requiring 'Heading 1' style are: Abstract, Specific Aims, Research Strategy, Innovation, Approach, and References.
